Class ResourceKind

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.core.util.ExtensibleEnum
org.jscience.social.economics.ResourceKind
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ExtensibleEnum>
public final class ResourceKind extends ExtensibleEnum
An extensible enumeration for resource classifications. Supports standard categories like RAW_MATERIAL, PRODUCT, etc., but allows for dynamic extensions.
Since:
1.2
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
See Also:
